service.name: Plaid API
service.description_for_ai: Connect to 12,000+ bank accounts. Access transactions, balances, identity, income verification. Powers apps like Venmo, Robinhood, Betterment. Use for personal finance apps, expense tracking, bank account linking.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Retrieve bank transactions for linked account. Returns categorized transactions with merchant name, amount, date.

access_token.description: User bank access token from Link flow

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get real-time bank account balances for a linked account. Returns available and current balance for all accounts.

agent_hints.sandbox: Test with sandbox: https://sandbox.plaid.com. Use institution_id='ins_109508' and credentials user_good/pass_good.
agent_hints.link_flow: 1) POST /link/token/create → get link_token. 2) Open Plaid Link UI with token. 3) Get public_token. 4) POST /item/public_token/exchange → get access_token. 5) Use access_token for data.
agent_hints.products: Products: transactions, auth (account/routing), identity, liabilities, investments. Request only what you need.
agent_hints.webhooks: Essential for production: transactions/DEFAULT_UPDATE fires when new transactions available.
